title: Flaky Showoff Tunisian Bread Flatbread
description: Earthy, flaky flatbread that showcases Tunisian flavors, topped with a tangy gherkin relish and a sprinkle of cumin.
instructions: 1. In a small bowl, dissolve yeast and sugar in warm water and let sit for 5 minutes until foamy.
2. In a large mixing bowl, whisk flour and salt together.
3. Make a well in the center and pour in the yeast mixture and olive oil.
4. Mix until a sticky dough forms, then knead on a floured surface for 8-10 minutes until smooth and elastic.
5. Place dough in a lightly oiled bowl, cover with a damp cloth, and let rise in a warm place for 1 to 1.5 hours until doubled in size.
6. Punch down the dough and divide it into 4 equal portions.
7. Roll each portion into a thin circle, about 15 cm in diameter, using a rolling pin or by hand.
8. Heat a non-stick skillet or cast-iron griddle over medium heat and brush lightly with olive oil.
9. Cook each flatbread for 2-3 minutes per side until golden brown and flaky, flipping once.
10. Spread a thin layer of gherkin relish on each warm flatbread, sprinkle with parsley, lemon zest, and a pinch of cumin, then serve immediately.
